**Email 1: Friendly Setup Message**

Subject: Just Joined CatchSafe!

Hi there,

I just finished setting up my CatchSafe account and wanted to say hello! I'm Maria, and I'm excited to start using the app.

I've been wanting to be more mindful about seafood safety for my family, and CatchSafe came highly recommended. I love cooking fish and trying new recipes, so having a reliable resource for safety information will be really helpful.

Looking forward to exploring all the features!

Best,
Maria

**Email 2: Casual Follow-Up**

Subject: Getting Started with CatchSafe

Hi CatchSafe Team,

Maria
